notices.title: Annual General Meeting 2026
notices.description: The Annual General Meeting (AGM) of CPVA will be held on 15th July 2026 at the CPVA Hall, Chattogram. All members are requested to attend. Key agenda items include annual report presentation, financial summary, and election of new executive committee members.

notices.title: Membership Renewal Deadline
notices.description: All members are reminded to renew their annual membership by 30th June 2026. Renewal fee: BDT 5,000. Payment can be submitted via bKash, Nagad, or Rocket. After the deadline, late fees will apply.

notices.title: New BVC Registration Guidelines
notices.description: Bangladesh Veterinary Council (BVC) has issued updated registration guidelines effective from 1st July 2026. All CPVA members are advised to review the changes and update their documentation accordingly.

notices.title: Continuing Education Program
notices.description: CPVA is launching a new Continuing Education Program starting August 2026. Topics will include modern veterinary practices, livestock management, and emerging diseases. Members will receive certificates upon completion.

notices.title: Office Closed - Public Holiday
notices.description: CPVA office will remain closed on 1st June 2026 on account of the public holiday. Regular operations will resume from 2nd June.
